verbatim_evidence.claim: {"id": "BRIEF-1", "axis": "ZEB1 \u2192 ITGAV (synthetic lethality)", "evidence_tier": "CRISPR_VALIDATED", "deal_ready": true, "delta": -0.7184, "fdr": 0.001203, "status": "DEAL_READY", "indication": "NSCLC brain metastasis (BrM)", "what_zeb1_is": "ZEB1 (Zinc finger E-box binding homeobox 1) is a master regulator of epithelial-mesenchymal transition (EMT). In NSCLC/BrM, ZEB1-high tumors have undergone EMT \u2014 they are more invasive, more metastatic, and more resistant to chemotherapy. ZEB1-high is a marker of aggressive disease.", "what_itgav_is": "ITGAV (Integrin alpha-V) is a cell surface receptor that mediates cell adhesion to the extracellular matrix.
